function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to the client at the tax firm (Claudia Reiter).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write appears valid: attachment path was previously read, single-item ordering satisfies newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles entity, subject safely quoted. Next required step from inbox workflow is deleting processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with refs and actions
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox note, created outbound draft with correct linked invoice, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the request. I created an outbound email draft at `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md` replying to `miles@novak.example` with the single oldest invoice linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter): `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md`. Then I deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree -> read AGENTS.MD -> context), read nested AGENTS for entered folders, used inbox workflow for lowest filename processing, used processing-inbox-email for canonical sender metadata, used sending-email for outbox format, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender `miles@novak.example` from inbox frontmatter matched `10_entities/cast/miles.md` primary_contact_email, so identity was verified. 'Client at the tax firm' resolved to Claudia Reiter via `10_entities/cast/claudia.md` and invoice linkage was confirmed by invoice records containing `related_entity | Claudia Reiter`; the oldest linked invoice is dated 2025-12-11 (`inv_0006`). Outbound draft was written in required outbox location with exact attachment path, then processed inbox item was removed per workflow.
